name: Soul Binding Gate
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>魂</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>縛</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ばく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>門</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>もん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: To activate this card you must control no monsters, and a Set Spell/Trap(s) you control must have been destroyed by card effect this turn. During the Main Phase, if exactly 1 monster with less ATK than your LP is Summoned and you have "Z-ONE" in your GY: Destroy that monster, and if you do, take 800 damage, then inflict 800 damage to your opponent.
eff: To activate this card you must control no monsters, and a Set Spell/Trap(s) you control must have been destroyed by card effect this turn. During the Main Phase, if exactly 1 monster with less ATK than your LP is Summoned and you have "Z-ONE" in your GY: Destroy that monster, and if you do, take 800 damage, then inflict 800 damage to your opponent.
